title: Dolia dubia
taxonomy: Dolia dubia is classified in the kingdom Plantae. It belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. Further classification places Dolia dubia in the genus Gesneriaceae, and it is the only species within this genus. This classification is based on various characteristics and features of the plant.
